summary: Security/tooling PR that updated the locked Rust dependency mio from 0.8.10 to 0.8.11 in Cargo.lock, including the corresponding checksum and Cargo.lock format version change. The PR body frames the update as addressing CVE-2024-27308 from a Trivy scan, but the loaded diff only shows Cargo.lock changes and no review discussion.

key_files.role: Updated generated Cargo lockfile: lockfile version 3 to 4, mio 0.8.10 to 0.8.11, and mio checksum.

what_changed.text: Cargo.lock lockfile format version changed from 3 to 4.
The Cargo.lock entry for package mio changed from version 0.8.10 to 0.8.11.
The mio package checksum was updated to a4a650543ca06a924e8b371db273b2756685faae30f8487da1b56505a8f78b0c.
The PR body claims the dependency update addresses CVE-2024-27308 and was prompted by a Trivy scanner finding in Cargo.lock.

smart_moves.text: Kept the dependency update narrow in the loaded diff: only the generated Cargo.lock changed, limiting blast radius for a security lockfile update.

evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Changes lists Cargo.toml and Cargo.lock
notes: The concrete file change is well supported by changed-file metadata and the loaded diff.

The PR body says both Cargo.toml and Cargo.lock changed, but loaded changed-file metadata and diff show only Cargo.lock; this intake treats Cargo.toml as an unsupported body claim rather than a changed file.

The PR body claims build pass, scanner re-scan, and LLM code review, but no CI output, scanner output, review records, or comments are loaded; record these only as author assertions, not independently verified results.
No decompilation source, matching work, naming changes, assembly tactics, or reviewer feedback are present in the slice.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Narrow Cargo.lock-only security dependency update
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2642 updated Cargo.lock for mio 0.8.10 to 0.8.11 with a new checksum, framed by the author as a CVE-2024-27308 security fix. The loaded diff contains no decompilation source changes.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Summary says upgrade mio from 0.8.10 to 0.8.11 to fix CVE-2024-27308

rejection_notes: Do not add a decompilation lesson from this PR; the slice contains no C source, assembly, objdiff, matching tactic, or naming evidence.
Do not record Cargo.toml as changed from this slice; the body lists it, but changed-file metadata and raw diff only show Cargo.lock.
Do not promote the claimed build pass, scanner re-scan, or LLM review as verified project validation without external CI/scanner/review evidence.
